parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets logic-high level and twice the CMPCK decision threshold

modeling_constraints: Update decision state only at CMPCK crossings through vdd/2 and hold it between events.
Drive smooth voltage-coded outputs using td_cmp and tr.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, hard-coded waveform sample points, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Each falling CMPCK crossing through vdd/2 resets both DCMPN and DCMPP low.
On a rising CMPCK crossing with VINP greater than VINN, DCMPP is high and DCMPN is low.
On a rising CMPCK crossing with VINP less than VINN, DCMPN is high and DCMPP is low.
On a rising CMPCK crossing with equal inputs, both outputs remain low.
The reset or decided state holds between CMPCK events and output changes use td_cmp delay and tr smoothing.

title: Clocked Comparator Reset Low
